page.title: Register your property
page.subtitle: Tell us a bit about your place. We'll review and help complete the formalities — fast.

form.coverPreviewNote: Preview only — final will be uploaded on submit.
form.consent: By submitting, you agree that a VAiyu specialist may contact you to verify details.

err.contactNameRequired: Owner / Primary contact name is required.
err.mapLinkInvalid: Google Map link must start with http or https.
err.linkInvalid: Each website/Instagram link must start with http or https.
err.imageType: Cover image must be PNG, JPG, or WEBP.
err.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ok.submitted: Thanks! We've received your property details. Our team will review and contact you soon.
